summary: Build a donation website similar to gaza.hdfund.org for a Gaza relief fundraising campaign, now for truehopefoundation.in.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Humanitarian relief hero banner showing hope and community support, warm and uplifting tones (hero-truehope.dim_1200x600.png)

existing_features.title: Create a public, responsive donation landing page modeled on the overall structure and user experience of https://gaza.hdfund.org, including a hero section, clear fundraising appeal text, key impact/aid categories, trust/FAQ-style informational sections, and prominent donate calls-to-action throughout the page.
Implement a donation/pledge form UI that lets a user select a preset amount and/or enter a custom amount, optionally enter a name and message, and submit the donation/pledge.
Display campaign progress on the landing page, including a configurable goal amount, current total raised, donation count, and a progress bar.
Add a recent donations/pledges section that lists the most recent submissions (respecting privacy by allowing anonymous display when no name is provided).

Apply a cohesive, distinctive visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) suitable for a humanitarian fundraising campaign, and enforce it consistently across the site (do not use a blue/purple default theme).
Add static campaign imagery assets (hero/banner, simple icon set) and integrate them into the page layout from the frontend public assets directory.

Update all landing page copy, headings, and descriptive text to reflect True Hope Foundation's mission and the truehopefoundation.in domain, replacing any Gaza-specific references with appropriate humanitarian relief messaging
Generate a new hero banner image suitable for True Hope Foundation's humanitarian relief mission (hero-truehope.dim_1200x600.png) and replace the existing hero image
Update campaign configuration to set an appropriate fundraising goal for True Hope Foundation

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a donation fundraising website similar to gaza.hdfund.org (Gaza relief campaign donation page).
Add backend storage and APIs to record submitted pledges and compute campaign totals (total amount and count), and expose query methods the frontend can use to display live totals.
